problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mitochondrial. Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
